formInstance.inputDocument: Jack Carter submits for your consideration a work of Fiction titled "Forgotten Legends." With a Word Count of 5800, this captivating narrative immerses readers in "A fantastical adventure set in a world of myths and forgotten gods." Jack Carter has indicated a Preferred Issue of Spring 2024 for publication. Notably, this work has not been previously published, and it is a simultaneous submission. The author has agreed to the submission guidelines and terms of publication. Although the Manuscript File has not been included, further communication can be conducted via Email Address: jack.carter77@icloud.com.

goldAnswers.Title: Forgotten Legends
goldAnswers.Abstract/Summary: A fantastical adventure set in a world of myths and forgotten gods.
